entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum bicolor (L.) Moench, the crop studied for grain hardness and mold resistance

entities.name: GRAM MOLD COMPLEX
entities.description: A complex of fungi causing mold in sorghum

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: The location in India where the sorghum cultivars were grown

entities.name: POSTRAINY SEASON
entities.description: The weather season from 1988-1989 during the study

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The weather seasons in 1989 and 1990 during the study

entities.name: GRAIN HARDNESS
entities.description: The physical hardness of sorghum grains measured by various methods

entities.name: STENVERT HARDNESS TESTER
entities.description: A method measuring the grinding time required to obtain a fixed volume of flour

entities.name: KIYA AND INSTRON FOOD TESTERS
entities.description: Methods measuring the force required to break sorghum grains

entities.name: DENSITY GRADING
entities.description: A method using sodium nitrate solution to measure the percentage of floating grains

entities.name: ERGOSTEROL CONCENTRATION
entities.description: A chemical measure used to assess the extent of mold damage in grains

entities.name: MOLD DAMAGE
entities.description: The state of sorghum grains being attacked by mold

entities.name: MOLD RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum cultivars to resist the gram mold complex

entities.name: MOLD SUSCEPTIBILITY
entities.description: The tendency of sorghum cultivars to be affected by the gram mold complex

relationships.description: negatively correlated with in white sorghum grains
